summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Manuel Schappert Personenbeförderung website. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, phone links, responsive design, and legal pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu phone button href attribute not directly accessible via data-testid (functionality works via parent anchor)

passed_tests: Hero Section renders with CTA buttons (Jetzt anrufen, Unsere Leistungen)
Phone number link (tel:067532610) is clickable in all locations
Navigation links scroll to correct sections (#leistungen, #ueber-uns, #warum-wir, #kontakt)
Services Section displays all 7 service cards correctly
About Section renders with content and image
Why Us Section displays 6 feature cards and 4 stats (10+ Jahre, 1000+ Kunden, 24/7, 100%)
Contact Section displays phone, email, address with correct links
Footer renders with Impressum and Datenschutz links
/impressum page loads correctly with all required legal content
/datenschutz page loads correctly with GDPR compliance content
Mobile sticky CTA visible and functional on mobile viewport
All images load correctly on desktop and mobile
All sections accessible on mobile devices
Responsive design works across desktop and mobile viewports
